name: Bartender
description: Menu bar manager — hide, rearrange, and organize menu bar icons

extraction.notes: Likely Sparkle feed URL for Bartender 5. The exact URL may differ; verify by checking SUFeedURL in app bundle's Info.plist. Older versions (Bartender 4) may use different feed path.

changelog.notes: Release notes in <sparkle:releaseNotesLink> or <description> within appcast item.

notes: Paid app (Bartender 5 is the current version). Uses Sparkle for auto-updates. Also available via Mac App Store. Note: Bartender changed ownership in 2024 and underwent security scrutiny — users should verify the authenticity of updates. The appcast URL pattern assumes Bartender5 directory; older versions (Bartender 4, Bartender 3) used different paths.
